title: Clinical and genetic spectrum of a large cohort of children with epilepsy in China.
author: Yang L Kong Y Dong X Hu L Lin Y Chen X Ni Q Lu Y Wu B Wang H Lu QR Zhou W
content:
S-EPMC6681813 PMC6681813 Clinical and genetic spectrum of a large cohort of children with epilepsy in China.

Purpose

Genetic diagnosis for children suffering from epilepsy has important implications for treatment, prognosis, and development of precision medicine strategies.

Methods
